context_text: <A> ok i thought you meant that you thought like i don't know people weren't for it and you just think that people don't really have as much of an opinion as in prior years / <B> oh / <A> i think if it were closer to and election time for the president perhaps it would be more in the forefront / <B> right / <A> and people would pay a little bit more attention and i think the president would have to listen to more of what the country says instead of what he feels i used to have this vague like yes we have to get saddam hussein and i just you know but i am always big on the news as i watched the different special with like uh sixty minutes two / <B> mhm / <A> how people quote unquote leak information to the press but in fact that information isn't all true { and they } / <B> [ okay ] / <A> made a um a special thing about something that iraq was trying to buy these aluminum tubes that supposedly were used for nuclear warheads and come to find out it could be used for a multitude of things / <B> right
